description: Explicit N/A controls for surfaces absent from this repository (machine register).

rows.n_a_rationale: No GraphQL server or schema in this Next.js + Supabase codebase.
No iOS/Android native apps in-repo; web-only surface.
No LDAP or XPath query paths; Postgres via Supabase client only.
No MongoDB or document DB query API in application code.
Stryker mutation testing is opt-in (qa-max-nightly workflow_dispatch run_stryker, optional stryker.conf); default CI does not enforce a PR kill-rate gate.
